---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Reveries"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: essays
  type: table
  sort: order
  fields: [title, date]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
format:
  html:
    css: 
      - /assets/css/styles_home.css
      - /assets/css/reveries.css
---
::: {.hero-image}
![](/assets/media/images/reveries.png){.hero-illustration}
:::
